Q-001.comment: Pilot licenses assigned to initial cross-functional cohort.

Q-002.comment: All pilot users are in Entra with Exchange Online mailboxes.

Q-003.comment: Most pilot devices are on supported M365 Apps channel; a few remain to be updated.

Q-004.comment: Proxy and endpoint policy updates in progress for branch offices.

Q-005.comment: Feature Updates scheduled task currently disabled by endpoint baseline.

Q-006.comment: Admins are covered; some pilot users still on temporary MFA exceptions.

Q-007.comment: Conditional Access baseline not fully enforced yet.

Q-008.comment: Interim oversharing protections not yet applied to known high-risk sites.

Q-009.comment: External sharing baseline is being inventoried.

Q-010.comment: Sensitivity labels published, but adoption/coverage is still early.

Q-011.comment: DLP baseline has not been turned on for all target locations.

Q-012.comment: Unified audit logging is enabled with default retention.

Q-013.comment: Teams recording/transcription settings are inconsistent across groups.

Q-014.comment: Loop/Whiteboard Copilot scenarios not yet in pilot scope.

Q-015.comment: Pilot ring and champions identified in Sales, Finance, and HR.

Q-016.comment: Enablement assets drafted; launch communications still pending review.

Q-017.comment: DSPM/SharePoint risk assessment has not been run yet.

Q-018.comment: Test environment established for pilot validation.

Q-019.comment: No recurring access review cycle yet for high-risk collaboration spaces.

Q-020.comment: Baseline device compliance exists; app protection policies still being tuned.

Q-021.comment: Retention and investigation requirements are not formally defined.

Q-022.comment: App privacy and connected experiences reviewed for most pilot devices.

results.note: Sample snapshot for an early pilot stage organization.
